\tzpentry{ID4752}{Text Quantum Magnetization Expansion}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4752 introduces Text Quantum Magnetization Expansion as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation}\n\t\\hat{M}_{\\text{cat}} = \\sum_{\\mu} \\left( \\frac{-\\hbar^2}{2m_{\\mu}} \\nabla^2 + V_{\\text{coulomb}} \\right) \\otimes \\exp\\left( -\\frac{r}{\\alpha \\lambda_{\\mu}} \\right)\n\\end{equation}
